about.description1: I am a developer and designer currently pursuing a Double Degree in Human-Computer Interaction and Design at EIT Digital (Politecnico di Milano and Aalto University).
about.description2: My strong background in Computer Engineering, combined with my passion for UI/UX, allows me to bridge the gap between technical implementation and user needs.
